Josh Duggar blasts 'false accusations' from prison after brother Joseph arrested for alleged sexual abuse of nine-year-old girl
items.deck: The convicted sex offender currently serving a 12-year prison has defended his brother Joe, who was arrested this week for allegedly sexually abusing a nine-year-old girl in 2020.

items.title: Judge orders council to fix potholes in three roads after frustrated driver took action using little-known legislation
items.deck: Derek Bennett, 68, took action after becoming fed up with the dire condition of streets in in his home village of Berkhamsted in Hertfordshire and nearby Hemel Hempstead, both in Hertfordshire.

items.title: Epstein's former attorney testifies he had 'no knowledge whatsoever' of crimes
items.deck: Darren Indyke, longtime attorney for Jeffrey Epstein, testified he "did not know" of Epstein's sexual abuse of women and girls.

items.title: Lesbian prison secrets of 'hell on wheels' teen Mackenzie Shirilla who killed boyfriend and friend by crashing into wall at 100mph... as inmates reveal her mean girl antics behind bars
items.deck: Mackenzie Shirilla has become a prolific lesbian behind bars, with a former inmate at her prison revealing shocking details of her romances and prison cruelty.

items.title: Eid brings 30,000 Muslims to Birmingham park in mass outdoor prayer to mark end of Ramadan
items.deck: Huge crowds descended on Small Heath Park in the city centre early on Friday morning to take part in prayer to mark the end of the holy month, which sees Muslims fast from dawn to dusk.
